hooks.command: OUT=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | xargs npx prettier --write 2>&1) || { echo "$OUT" >&2; exit 2; }
OUT=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | xargs npx oxlint --deny-warnings 2>&1) || { echo "$OUT" >&2; exit 2; }

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path') && case "$FILE" in */packages/runtime/*) TSCONFIG=packages/runtime/tsconfig.json ;; */packages/toolbar/*) TSCONFIG=packages/toolbar/tsconfig.json ;; */packages/experiences/*) TSCONFIG=packages/experiences/tsconfig.json ;; */apps/resolver/*) TSCONFIG=apps/resolver/tsconfig.json ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac && OUT=$(npx tsc --noEmit -p "$TSCONFIG" 2>&1) || { echo "$OUT" >&2; exit 2; }
